name: Redundant Manipulator Null-Space Exploration
description: A robotics control engineer needs to map the null-space of a 7-DOF robot arm (e.g., Panda or KUKA) in CoppeliaSim to avoid an obstacle without moving the tool. Generate at least 30 distinct, collision-free joint configurations for a fixed end-effector (TCP) pose by moving the robot's elbow within its null-space. Export the configurations to /home/ga/Documents/CoppeliaSim/exports/nullspace_configs.csv (columns: config_id, j1, j2, j3, j4, j5, j6, j7, tcp_x, tcp_y, tcp_z, elbow_x, elbow_y, elbow_z) and a summary to /home/ga/Documents/CoppeliaSim/exports/nullspace_report.json (fields: robot_model, total_distinct_configs, tcp_variance_m, max_elbow_displacement_m). Login: username=ga, password=password123.
